test.command: cargo test -j 4 && (cd src-tauri && cargo test -j 4) && (cd frontend && npm test -- --run)

appliedUpdates.description: Updated `.factory/library/architecture.md` to document the shared fixtures module as `frontend/src/test/fixtures.tsx` (TSX required due JSX mocks).
Added read-only snapshot fixture guidance to `.factory/library/user-testing.md` recommending save-then-reuse v2 snapshots instead of hand-crafted partial JSON.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require explicit `skillFeedback` deviation logging whenever a required UI verification step cannot be completed (for example fixture parse failures during agent-browser checks), instead of reporting `followedProcedure: true` with empty deviations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `m6-fix-section-card-tone-and-icon-parity` found an unfinished read-only UI check in handoff interactiveChecks while skillFeedback reported no deviations.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Keep mission AGENTS/library references aligned on the shared fixtures filename (`fixtures.tsx`) when JSX mocks are required, to avoid contradictory worker requirements.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `m6-fix-shared-test-fixtures-third-suite` found mission AGENTS/library references to `fixtures.ts` while implementation and feature contract require `fixtures.tsx`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add fixture-only refactor guidance that allows no-op red-first steps when behavior is unchanged and tests are pure dedup/migration work, with explicit rationale in handoff.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review `m6-fix-shared-test-fixtures-third-suite` recorded procedural deviation pressure around strict failing-test-first despite purely structural test-fixture consolidation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Rust-worker procedure mismatch from one fix handoff that omitted explicit `cd src-tauri && cargo fmt --check` / `cargo clippy` commands while still passing end-to-end tests.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous single-sample observation; insufficient evidence of recurring systemic drift.
